title: dortmanna radicans
intro: Dortmanna radicans, also known as American Cramp Bark, is a deciduous shrub native to North America, characterized by its showy white flowers and reddish-brown bark. The plant contains medicinal properties in its bark, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including muscle spasms, menstrual cramps, and anxiety. The health benefits of Dortmanna radicans include its ability to relax smooth muscles, reduce inflammation, and lower blood pressure, making it a popular herbal remedy for cardiovascular and gynecological conditions. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna radicans can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, with the bark typically dried and crushed before use.
